description: Queen Patch 7 (11 March 2020) — Alliance Silver/Fame Penalty (Part 2 of Alliance Limit Test), Dungeon Loot Rework, Outlands Portal Zone Shrines, Fixes.

sections.heading: Alliance Silver/Fame Penalty
items: All players within an alliance will receive reduced Silver and Fame income if the alliance holds 10 or more territories (excluding Castles and Castle Outposts)
Also applies to players in guilds without an alliance, if their guild holds 10 or more territories
Applies to all Fame gained from gathering and PvE, and all Silver gained from mob drops and downed players
Penalty starts at 1% with the 10th territory and increases by 1% per additional territory
sections.searchable_text: Alliance Silver Fame Penalty territories 10 Castles Castle Outposts gathering PvE mob drops downed players 1% per territory

sections.heading: Black Market Loot in Randomized Dungeon Chests
sections.description: Reworked the loot in randomized dungeon chests following community feedback, using old T6 chest balancing as a baseline.
items: T6 chests have been largely reverted to the status they had on Queen's launch
T7 chests no longer contain T4 loot and have higher drop chances for T7 and T8 loot than T6 chests
T8 chests no longer contain T4 and T5 loot, and have much higher drop chances for T7 and T8 loot than T6 chests
sections.searchable_text: Black Market Loot Randomized Dungeon Chests Solo Group Elite T6 T7 T8 drop chances reworked Queen launch

sections.heading: Outlands Portal Zone Updates
sections.description: Added shrines to the immediate area around Outlands portals and near each exit. Total portal zone exits increased — each now has 4 exits. Shrines grant invisibility under the following conditions:
items: Player is silenced and unable to attack for 2 minutes 30 seconds
Using the shrine resets the timer on any protection bubble already in place
Leaving the zone immediately cancels the invisibility buff and silence debuff
The shrine buff always has a 10-minute cooldown before it can be reactivated, regardless of whether a different invisibility shrine is used
These shrines cannot be used by players with "Outlaw" status
sections.searchable_text: Outlands Portal Zone shrines portals 4 exits invisibility 2 minutes silenced 2 minutes 30 seconds protection bubble 10 minute cooldown Outlaw status

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where an incorrect/misleading ingame message was sent when triggering manual item recovery from a Hideout
Stairs added to Level 3 Hideouts between entrance and plaza levels
Additional minor graphical, terrain, animation, UI, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes item recovery Hideout message Level 3 Hideouts stairs entrance plaza graphical terrain animation UI audio localization
